business.name: Edwards Bathroom Plumbing & Heating Supplies Ltd

sample_reviews.author: Mark T
sample_reviews.text: Great local merchant with a solid range of plumbing and heating supplies. Staff are knowledgeable and always happy to help. My go-to trade counter in Birmingham.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah H
sample_reviews.text: Really helpful team who know their products inside out. Good stock levels and competitive pricing. Would recommend to any local tradespeople.

sample_reviews.author: Dave W
sample_reviews.text: Been using Edwards for years — reliable, friendly and they always have what I need. Saved me a trip into the city centre more times than I can count.

brand.usp: Edwards Bathroom Plumbing & Heating Supplies is a trusted local merchant in Birmingham, offering a comprehensive range of plumbing, bathroom and heating products for both trade professionals and domestic customers. We pride ourselves on expert product knowledge and friendly, efficient service from our well-stocked trade counter.
brand.about_paragraph: We're Edwards Bathroom Plumbing & Heating Supplies, a family-run trade merchant based in Bordesley Green, Birmingham. We stock a wide range of plumbing, bathroom and heating products to keep your projects moving, whether you're a sole trader or a large contracting firm. Come and visit our trade counter at Kyngsford Road — we're here to make sure you always leave with exactly what you need.
